items.name: Bat Right Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Join The Group For More Cool Items! ----> https://www.roblox.com/communities/10147459/Solitary-UGC#!/store

Add a spooky and unique touch to your avatar with the Bat Right Shoulder Pet.
Perfect for dark outfits, Halloween themes, and standout avatar styles.
Designed to sit naturally on the right shoulder with a creepy-cool look.
